narrative:
Lake 7 (precinct in Stark County) has 673 registered voters, with 46.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.5 percentage points.
